flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Colby College rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($61.2k → $69.6k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Colby College rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($61.2k → $69.6k).

flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Colby College are 79% above the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($80.5k vs $45.0k).
